side_effects.description: Started Tesamorelin about 1 month before Semaglutide. Day 1 of Semaglutide: itchy mosquito bite-like reaction at injection site. Day 6: increased itching. Day 3 of Tesamorelin: hives at injection site, extreme itching on feet, palms, and lips.
Hives around injection site and extremities (feet, palms, lips). Small reaction when restarting Tesamorelin 1 week after final Semaglutide shot. No reaction 2 weeks after final Semaglutide injection.

protocol_notes: Stopped Tesamorelin until Semaglutide was completed. Restarted Tesamorelin 1 week after final Semaglutide shot with reduced reaction. User could not find similar reaction reports elsewhere.
